title: Car Insurance Claim
scene: 你打电话申报车险理赔。

turns.en: Claims department. Policy number, please.
POL one two three four five six. Rear-ended yesterday. Other driver was at fault.
Any injuries? Did you file a police report?

turns.cn: 没人受伤，警察出了报告。
turns.en: No injuries. Police filed a report.

turns.cn: 请上传照片和报告到App，定损师会联系您。
turns.en: Upload photos and the report in the app. An adjuster will contact you.
Is a rental car covered while mine's in the shop?

turns.cn: 您的保单含三十天代步车。
turns.en: Your policy includes thirty days of rental.

title: Health Insurance
scene: 你打电话问保险是否覆盖某项检查。

turns.en: Member services. Member ID, please.

turns.cn: ID789012，核磁共振保险公司报吗？
turns.en: ID seven eight nine zero one two. Is an MRI covered?

turns.cn: 需要医生转诊单，自付额两百。
turns.en: You need a referral. Your deductible is two hundred.
Which hospitals are in-network?
I'll text you a link to search.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Buying Home Insurance
scene: 你买房后咨询房屋保险。

turns.en: Congrats on the new home! Need a quote?

turns.cn: 是的，独栋，一千八百平方英尺。
turns.en: Yes. Single-family, about eighteen hundred square feet.
Flood insurance is separate in this area.
Roughly how much per year?

turns.cn: 基本险一年一千二左右。
turns.en: About twelve hundred for basic coverage.
Please send me the full terms.
I'll email you before end of day.

title: Travel Insurance
scene: 出国前你买旅行保险并咨询理赔范围。

turns.cn: 下个月去欧洲两周，有合适的旅行险吗？
turns.en: I'm going to Europe for two weeks next month. Any travel insurance?

turns.cn: 含航班延误、行李丢失和医疗。
turns.en: It covers flight delays, lost luggage, and medical.
What if I have to cancel the trip?

turns.cn: 买可取消险，生病或紧急情况可赔。
turns.en: Get cancel-for-any-reason or illness and emergency coverage.
How much is it?

turns.cn: 您年龄和行程，大概七十九块。
turns.en: For your age and trip, about seventy-nine dollars.
Okay, sign me up.
